A door belongs\n// to exit 0 (left) or exit 1 (right). All doors of exit e are open\n// when the count of e in doors[..k] equals the total count of e in doors.\nghost predicate CanExitAfter(doors: seq<int>, k: int)\n  requires 0 <= k <= |doors|\n{\n  CountVal(doors[..k], 0) == CountVal(doors, 0) ||\n  CountVal(doors[..k], 1) == CountVal(doors, 1)\n}\n\nmethod TheDoors(n: int, doors: seq<int>) returns (k: int)\n  requires n == |doors|\n  requires n >= 2\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1\n  requires CountVal(doors, 0) >= 1\n  requires CountVal(doors, 1) >= 1\n  ensures 1 <= k <= n\n  ensures CanExitAfter(doors, k)\n  ensures forall j | 0 <= j < k :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)\n{\n  var a := 0;\n  var b := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < n\n    invariant 0 <= i <= n\n    invariant a == CountVal(doors[..i], 0)\n    invariant b == CountVal(doors[..i], 1)\n  {\n    assert doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1;\n    assert doors[..i+1][..i] == doors[..i];\n    if doors[i] == 0 {\n      a := a + 1;\n    } else {\n      b := b + 1;\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert doors[..n] == doors;\n\n  var x := 0;\n  var y := 0;\n  i := 0;\n  while i < n\n    invariant 0 <= i <= n\n    invariant x == CountVal(doors[..i], 0)\n    invariant y == CountVal(doors[..i], 1)\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j <= i :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)\n  {\n    assert doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1;\n    assert doors[..i+1][..i] == doors[..i];\n    if doors[i] == 1 {\n      y := y + 1;\n    } else {\n      x := x + 1;\n    }\n    if x == a || y == b {\n      return i + 1;\n    }\n    assert !CanExitAfter(doors, i + 1);\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert doors[..n] == doors;\n  assert CanExitAfter(doors, n);\n  return 0;\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9970,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":9970},"output_tokens":11,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9063f8e9-794b-4b58-b306-e32a91c728e1","uuid":"509b39c9-0414-43b0-a51c-39fc33a35e51"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QT1pFGBbWceBqos6JBq1j8","type":"tool_result","content":"File Count occurrences of value v in sequence s\nghost function CountVal(s: seq<int>, v: int): int\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 then 0\n  else CountVal(s[..|s|-1], v) + (if s[|s|-1] == v then 1 else 0)\n}\n\n// After opening the first k doors in order, Mr. Black can exit iff\n// all doors belonging to at least one exit are open. A door belongs\n// to exit 0 (left) or exit 1 (right). All doors of exit e are open\n// when the count of e in doors[..k] equals the total count of e in doors.\nghost predicate CanExitAfter(doors: seq<int>, k: int)\n  requires 0 <= k <= |doors|\n{\n  CountVal(doors[..k], 0) == CountVal(doors, 0) ||\n  CountVal(doors[..k], 1) == CountVal(doors, 1)\n}\n\nmethod TheDoors(n: int, doors: seq<int>) returns (k: int)\n  requires n == |doors|\n  requires n >= 2\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1\n  requires CountVal(doors, 0) >= 1\n  requires CountVal(doors, 1) >= 1\n  ensures 1 <= k <= n\n  ensures CanExitAfter(doors, k)\n  ensures forall j | 0 <= j < k :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)\n{\n  var a := 0;\n  var b := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < n\n    invariant 0 <= i <= n\n    invariant a == CountVal(doors[..i], 0)\n    invariant b == CountVal(doors[..i], 1)\n  {\n    assert doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1;\n    assert doors[..i+1][..i] == doors[..i];\n    if doors[i] == 0 {\n      a := a + 1;\n    } else {\n      b := b + 1;\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert doors[..n] == doors;\n\n  var x := 0;\n  var y := 0;\n  i := 0;\n  while i < n\n    invariant 0 <= i <= n\n    invariant x == CountVal(doors[..i], 0)\n    invariant y == CountVal(doors[..i], 1)\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j <= i :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)\n  {\n    assert doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1;\n    assert doors[..i+1][..i] ==
